profile.tagline: Building scalable interfaces and internal products with Vue.
profile.summary: I am a frontend developer with commercial experience in Vue 3 and the Vue ecosystem. I design interfaces, work with client-side logic, API integrations, responsive layout, and the evolution of UI platforms. My work is grounded in SOLID, DRY, KISS, BEM, and FSD principles.

portfolio.title: Projects and GitHub activity.
portfolio.description: This section will show project highlights powered by the GitHub API, dynamic stack filtering, and scroll-based reveal animations.
portfolio.dataBody: Project data is already centralized in a Pinia store. Current default username: {username}.
portfolio.filtersBody: Available languages will be built automatically from fetched repositories. The current system filter value is {filter}.
portfolio.statesBody: The store already includes idle / loading / success / error states and a retry action for repeated requests.

contacts.title: Contacts and a quick CTA.
contacts.description: This section will host contact links, email copy-to-clipboard feedback, and a contact form.
